title: neuractis bidens
intro: Neuractis bidens, also known as Bidens pilosa, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion tribe within the sunflower family, Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Neuractis bidens include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and swelling, and aid in wound healing. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to treat a range of ailments, including digestive issues and skin conditions.
